category_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a command-line YAML and XML processor that wraps jq.
source_facts.executables lists related CLI tools tomlq and xq.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official yq documentation site at kislyuk.github.io/yq.
source_facts.name is python-yq, the Homebrew formula name for the yq Python package.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage provides the official documentation URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was inferred from the official yq project identity and source_facts.homepage on kislyuk.github.io/yq.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line YAML and XML processor that wraps jq.
source_facts.executables lists tomlq and xq, indicating TOML and XML command-line processing.
